notes: The game runs flawless, you only need this tool called Media Foundation https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install It is easy to install, just place the prefix of the game and go. WINEPREFIX="/home/gaben/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/943260/pfx" ./install-mf.sh
